summary: This is a brief introductory note by Cathy O'Neil announcing a guest post written by her 7-year-old son Wolfie about his broken leg. The post itself contains minimal content beyond the introduction, serving primarily as a framing device for her son's contribution. O'Neil mentions Wolfie's recent accomplishment of learning to bike.
key_points: O'Neil occasionally features guest posts from family members, including her young children
The post documents a personal family milestone (Wolfie learning to bike)
This represents a departure from O'Neil's typical algorithmic critique content
money_quotes: Today's guest post is by Wolfie O'Neil, my 7-year-old son
key_insight: This brief post serves as a personal interlude in O'Neil's typically analytical blog, showcasing the human side behind the data scientist persona.
